arts.sum: Pompey are poised to welcome Regan Poole back into first-team contention.

arts.sum: John Mousinho has revealed Pompey’s points target to secure Championship survival.

arts.sum: After some shock exits and giant-killings in the fourth round, 16 teams remain in the FA Cup

arts.sum: Alex Robertson had a choice between returning to Pompey or joining Cardiff City in the summer.

arts.sum: He’s the sole member of Pompey’s eight transfer window captures still to break into the first-team squad, let alone make an appearance.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth, Hull and Plymouth rivals close in on new manager as £500,000 bid to avoid Championship relegation launched
arts.sum: Pompey relegation rivals Derby County are closing in on a replacement for sacked manager Paul Warne.

If you're making the most of your trip to Portsmouth and spending some extra time in Hampshire, why not check out some of these top tourist attractions? Standing at 170 meters tall, this striking landmark welcomes you to experience panoramic views of the city, harbour, and even the Isle of Wight.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City dealing with major blow ahead of huge Portsmouth clash
arts.sum: Cardiff City will be without manager Omer Riza for their relegation six-pointer with Pompey on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth title winner handed first league appearance in two years in comeback at Football League crisis club
arts.sum: A Pompey title winner has finally returned to league football - two years after his last appearance.
